questions.prompt: Which whole-app direction should guide the rebuild?
questions.description: This sets the first screen and navigation priority.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Command Center: keep existing screens, make the home screen show inbox/work status plus Second Brain Git status/actions, and promote Git to top-level navigation.

questions.prompt: What should be in scope for the first implementation pass?
questions.description: The smaller pass can ship quickly without backend changes.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Rebuild the app shell, dashboard, navigation, and Second Brain Git screen. Keep backend endpoints and existing data model unchanged.

questions.prompt: How should Git actions be presented?
questions.description: The app currently offers Sync, Commit, Pull, Push, and guarded force push.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Simple guided Git panel: big primary Sync button, commit message field, Pull/Commit/Push as clear actions, and force push kept behind the existing checkbox.

questions.description: Pick the outcomes that matter most for manual and automated verification.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Git is reachable from top-level navigation, the dashboard shows Second Brain state, key Git actions are obvious, and existing tests/build still pass.
